title: selaginella armata
intro: Selaginella armata is a type of spore-producing plant, belonging to the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as the spike moss. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella armata include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Selaginella armata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
